LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Bandoleer.descriptio: A bandoleer often worn by NCR troopers. It's used to store ammunition as well as personal trinkets or talismans.
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Bandoleer.label: Trooper Bandoleer
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Mantle.description: A simple mantle made from heavy fabrics. NCR officers often strap these to their shoulder. It doesn't offer much protection but insulates fairly well.
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Mantle.label: Trooper Mantle
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_California_Grizzly.descriptio: A large two headed bear from the mountains of California, this is the ideological and political symbol of the NCR and its military. This massive beast should be treated with respect and honor.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_California_Grizzly.label: California Grizzly
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_NCR_Guard_Dog.description: Some dogs have been domesticated, even charged with guarding its owner and all thier property this animal will do so to the best of its ability. While others have been specially bred to be a true battle buddy for the NCR. Tasked with defending troops from harm in the form of dangerous chems, explosives and enemy combatants themselves.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_NCR_Guard_Dog.label: NCR Guard Dog
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Dress.descrip: A stylish dress often worn by the ambassadors of the New California Republic. While it provides little to no actual protection, it boosts its wearer's confidence during negotiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Dress.label: NCR Ambassador Dress
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Suit.descript: A stylish suit often worn by the ambassadors of the New California Republic. While it provides little to no actual protection, it boosts its wearer's confidence during negotiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ambassador_Suit.label: NCR Ambassador's Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret.description: A simple green beret usually worn by officers of the NCR army. It mainly serves as an insignia of rank but offers a fair bit of protection against the weather.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret.label: NCR Beret
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret_1st_Recon.descript: A red beret worn by the members of the famed 1st recon battalion. They are renowned as some of the best snipers the republic can muster. Fittingly, their motto is: â€œthe last thing you never see.â€
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret_1st_Recon.label: NCR First Recon Beret
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Engineer_Jumpsuit.descri: A khaki jumpsuit with many pockets and pouches attached. Itï¿½s commonly worn by engineers and other technical personnel associated with the NCR. Itï¿½s useful for carrying around a few spare tools but provides little protection in a firefight.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Engineer_Jumpsuit.label: NCR Engineer Jumpsuit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Goggles_Helmet: A trooper helmet with goggles and a piece of fabric attached to it. The fabric can be wrapped around the face to protect the wearer against the dust storms that are common in parts of the Mojave.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Helmet.descrip: A trooper helmet with goggles and a piece of fabric attached to it. The fabric can be wrapped around the face to protect the wearer against the dust storms that are common in parts of the Mojave.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Helmet.label: Face Wrap Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_General_Cap.description: A cap adorned with the two-headed bear, the heraldic animal of the New California Republic. It serves as a symbol of rank for the republicâ€™s generals and is usually reserved for them.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_General_Cap.label: NCR General Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Generals_Uniform.descrip: A uniform reserved for the highest-ranking officers of the republicï¿½s army, the generals. Itï¿½s heavily decorated with motifs commonly associated with the NCR, such as the two-headed bear. It doesnï¿½t offer much protection, however, since the generals of the army rarely serve on the frontlines.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Generals_Uniform.label: NCR General Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Goggles_Helmet.descripti: A cheap, mass-produced helmet worn by the NCRâ€™s soldiers. This version comes with a pair of goggles attached which provide additional, albeit modest, protection for the wearerâ€™s eyes.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Goggles_Helmet.label: Goggles Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_MP_Helmet.description: A helmet with goggles usually worn by the members of the NCR military police. Like the uniform itself, it gives itâ€™s wearer an aura of authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_MP_Helmet.label: MP Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Presidents_Suit.descript: A stylish suit often worn by the president of the New California Republic and similar high-ranking government officials. While it provides little to no actual protection, it gives its wearer an air of authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Presidents_Suit.label: NCR President Suit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Casual.descriptio: An outfit often worn by the rangers off-duty or underneath additional armour pieces. Itï¿½s reminiscent of the outfits worn by the cowboys of old. Itï¿½s quite rugged and offers good protection against the scorching sun but should not be the only protection a rangers has once the bullets start flying.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Casual.label: NCR Ranger Casual Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Brown.descrip: A brown cowboy hat favoured by the NCR rangers. Itâ€™s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Brown.label: NCR Brown Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Grey.descript: A grey cowboy hat favoured by the NCR rangers. Itâ€™s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Grey.label: NCR Grey Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Patrol.descri: A simple cowboy hat favoured by the desert rangers, especially those patrolling the Mojave. Itâ€™s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Patrol.label: NCR Patrol Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Tan.descripti: A tan cowboy hat favoured by the NCR rangers. Itâ€™s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Tan.label: NCR Tan Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Patrol_Armor.desc: A suit of brownish combat armor, hand-manufactured in the NCR and most often worn by the NCR Rangers. As it is combat armor, itï¿½s sturdy and protects very well against damage, but weighs quite a lot.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Red_Scarf.descrip: Rugged clothes worn by the desert rangers. This particular outfit comes with a red scarf. Like most ranger clothes, it insulates well against the heat.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Red_Scarf.label: NCR Ranger Red Scarf Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Vest.description: A rugged vest worn by NCR Rangers. It provides good protection against the elements and is ideal for long patrols and reconnaissance missions in harsh environments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Vest.label: NCR Ranger Vest Outfit
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Armor.des: A combat vest composed of the chestplate of a combat armour. Itï¿½s often worn by the rangers and offers formidable protection. Its biggest drawback is that it only covers the torso, leaving the appendages unprotected.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Duster.de: A duster often worn by the rangers. Itï¿½s main use is to protect the wearer against the sun and temperatures of the Mojave Desert, but itï¿½s thick enough to provide additional protection in a firefight as well.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Veteran_Uniform.d: A set of clothes made from tough materials such as leathers. Itï¿½s often worn underneath armour by the rangers and is particularly well insulating against heat.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armor.des: A suit of T-45d power armor, captured by the NCR during the NCR-Brotherhood war. Technicians stripped out the servomotors and replaced the rad scrubbers with a custom air conditioning module, allowing it to be used by soldiers without the need of specialised training. This process, however, makes the armor much less effective. Despite that it still is, essentially, power armor and offers superior protection at the cost of enormous weight. It's usually only worn by the NCR heavy troopers.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armor_Hel: A T-45 power armor helmet usually worn paired with the NCR's salvaged power armors. Despite its salvaged nature, it offers excellent protection and, in contrast to the armor itself, has no major drawbacks compared to a regular power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Scout_Recon_Armor.descri: An armor usually worn by the NCRï¿½s sniper squads and recon teams. Itï¿½s very similar looking to other NCR armor, but is darker for camouflage purposes. It provides good protection but, like most NCR armors, is quite heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Scout_Recon_Armor.label: NCR Recon Assault Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Armor.descriptio: The standard armor for the rank and file of the NCR military forces. Itï¿½s composed of a khaki field jacket and breeches, an armored breastplate and brown combat boots. It protects its wearer well but is heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Armor.label: NCR Trooper Armor
This armor is essentially the regular NCR armed forces uniform composed of a khaki field jacket and breeches, an armored breastplate and brown combat boots, but features a bandoleer for carrying additional ammunition and other military equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Fatigues.descrip: This light piece of clothing consists of the standard khaki field jacket and breeches but lacks the armored breastplate other NCR armors sport. As such it is lighter but offers only inferior protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Fatigues.label: NCR Trooper Fatigues
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Helmet.descripti: The standard helmet of the NCR armed forces. It is mass-produced in the NCR and easy to make and maintain but offers only marginal protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Helmet.label: Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Mantle_Armor.des: This suit of armor is often worn by the sergeants and corporals of the NCR military. In addition to the standard khaki field jacket and breeches, as well as an armored breastplate, this armor also features a camouflaged cloth wrapped around the shoulder. It offers decent protection but is quite heavy.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_MP_Uniform.descr: A uniform labelling the wearer as a member of the NCR military police. Itï¿½s quite similar to other NCR uniforms but radiates the authority of the military police.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_MP_Uniform.label: NCR MP Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Vest.description: A vest often worn by NCR troopers. Itï¿½s composed of a reinforced chestplate and armoured pauldrons. While it offers quite a bit of additional protection, it only covers the torso and shoulders, leaving the lower body parts and the head unprotected.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Vest.label: NCR Trooper Vest
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Veteran_Ranger_Helmet.de: An enclosed military helmet with built-in low light optics and a gas mask worn by NCR Rangers. It offers better protection in comparison to the Trooper helmet but is significantly rarer.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Helmet.descripti: A riot helmet once worn by the guards of the NCRCF. Like many other parts of their gear, it has been apprehended by the Powder Gangers. It offers good protection, especially against blunt damage.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Helmet.label: NCRCF Guard Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Vest.description: A padded vest often worn by the guards of the NCRCF. While less protective than full-blown armour, it guards its wearer quite well against small firearms.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Vest.label: NCRCF Guard Vest
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Inmate_Uniform.descrip: A simple blue shirt with pants issued to the inmates of the NCRCF. These are simple clothes cheaply mass-produced in the NCR. As such they offer little to no protection in a fight but isolate quite well against the heat, since the NCR likes to use the inmates as roadworkers.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Inmate_Uniform.label: NCRCF Inmate Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Over_Shirt.description: A simple overshirt worn by inmates of the NCRCF. Itï¿½s meant to identify the inmates as such and doesnï¿½t offer much protection against any kind of threat. Despite this, the Powder Gangers still wear these, probably because of the lack of alternative garments.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Over_Shirt.label: NCRCF Over Shirt
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Armor.descripti: A combat vest composed of the chestplate of a combat armor. It�s often worn by the rangers and offers formidable protection. Its biggest drawback is that it only covers the torso, leaving the appendages unprotected. This set appears to have been customized with extra padding, and a heat resistant coating on the chestpiece. You can also make out a fant name scratched onto the neckpiece normally where unit designations go. "Ranger Rick"
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Armor.label: Ranger Ricks' Armor
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Duster.descript: A duster often worn by the rangers. It�s main use is to protect the wearer against the sun and temperatures of the Mojave Desert, but it�s thick enough to provide additional protection in a firefight as well. This one looks a bit rougher than most, having seen a lot of action. The colors are also different from those of the NCR Veterans, it has a darker brown color. It also has the badge of the Desert Rangers still pinned on the chest. A relic of a bygone era. On the inside of the duster someone has hurridly written "Rick".
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Duster.label: Ranger Ricks' Duster
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Helmet.descript: An enclosed military helmet with built-in low light optics and a gas mask worn by NCR Rangers. It offers better protection in comparison to the Trooper helmet but is significantly rarer. This version seems to have the enhanced low vis optics added in as well as a paint job. Theres a name written on the standard NCR item tag "Rick" as well as the words "FORGIVE ME MASHED" painted on the front of the helmet. Makes you wonder what happend to this Mashed person...
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Helmet.label: Ranger Ricks' Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Uniform.descrip: A set of clothes made from tough materials such as leathers. Seems as though this one is stronger and tougher than standard uniforms. The standard pants have also been replaced by a pair of worn blue jeans and the shirt has been dyed. The name Rick has also been scribbled on the standard NCR item tag on the inside of the shirt.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Ranger_Ricks_Uniform.label: Ranger Ricks' Uniform
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_NCR_Dollar.description: Paper money made and distributed by the New California Republic government as a means to replace caps. While not worth as much as the cap it is still a means of currency and should be valued as such.
LanguageData.FCP_Currency_NCR_Dollar.label: NCR Dollar
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Anti_Material_Rifle.description: The anti-materiel rifle is a high-calibre bolt-action precision rifle, originally intended for the use against military equipment. Naturally, it can be, and is, used against living targets. There are relatively few anti-materiel rifles in circulation in the wasteland, most of them in the hands of elite forces of larger factions or high-end mercenaries. As a pure sniper rifle it is very unwieldy and cannot be used effectively in close combat. Over long distances, however, its accuracy and potency are unparalleled, making it a truly fearsome weapon when used by an experienced shooter.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Anti_Material_Rifle.label: Anti-Material Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.description: A powerful bolt-action rifle with an attached iron sight intended for hunting big game. It is durable, accurate and easy to use and maintain weapon and thus a popular choice not only for hunters, but for many snipers in the NCR, Legion, and other groups. This particular design is boasted by the NCR recon snipers, featuring the two headed bear insignia.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.label: NCR Standard Hunting Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_NCR_Hunting_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.description: A rare, large caliber double-action revolver gifted to NCR rangers after 20 years of service. Itâ€™s a beautifully made weapon and decorated with NCR symbols and quotes. However, itâ€™s by no means just for show. In fact, it is one of the most powerful handguns in the whole wasteland and a testament for the skills of the Republicâ€™s gun smiths.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.label: Ranger Sequoia
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ranger_Sequoia.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.description: A general-purpose gas-operated assault rifle for field or urban combat. It has good range, decent power, and good accuracy.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.label: Service Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Service_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Food_Crate.description: A crate of food from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Food_Crate.label: NCR Food Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Ranger_Weapon_Crate.descrip: A crate of weapons from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Ranger_Weapon_Crate.label: NCR Weapon Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Standard_Uniform_Crate.desc: A crate of uniforms from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Standard_Weapon_Crate.descr: A crate of weapons from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Standard_Weapon_Crate.label: NCR Weapon Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Crate.descri: A crate of uniforms from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Crate.label: NCR Ranger Uniform Supply Crate
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Patrol_Armor: A crate of uniforms from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_NCR_Uniform_Ranger_Veteran_Armo: A crate of uniforms from the New California Republic, standard issue.
LanguageData.FCP_NCR_Building_Boulder_City_Memorial.d: Circa 2277, the New California Republic, in a decisive attack against Caesar's Legion during the First Battle of Hoover Dam, lured the bulk of the enemy into Boulder City, most of which was filled with high explosives, and detonated them, destroying the Legion's assault at the cost of many troopers who could not escape in time. Following the battle, the New California Republic built the memorial to honor the 107 Rangers and service members who lost their lives that day.
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_Vertibird.description: Vertibird is a designation for a series of vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft. These multipurpose tiltrotor aircraft were developed by the United States military and rapidly became a primary gunship and transport aircraft. This one is now in use by the New California Republic.
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_Vertibird.label: NCR vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_VertibirdIncoming.label: NCR vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_VertibirdLeaving.label: NCR vertibird (leaving)
